name: implement-test-review-fix-converge
description: For feature development or refactoring tasks. Implements code, tests it, then cycles review→fix→verify until convergence. Full quality gate.

steps.name: Implement
steps.what: Implement {{objective}} in {{target_files}}. Follow existing project conventions and patterns. Write production code only — tests come in the next step.
tools: Read → read existing code for patterns and interfaces

existence: All source files mentioned in deliverables exist
Each file compiles/parses without syntax errors
quality: Implementation matches the design from mission.md
No TODO or placeholder code remaining

steps.failure_handling: Fix syntax errors and retry. If design ambiguity, log and make reasonable default choice.

steps.name: Test
steps.what: Write tests for the implementation in Step 1. Cover: happy path, edge cases, error paths. Run {{verify_command}} to validate tests pass.
tools: Read → read implementation code to understand what to test

existence: Test files exist for each module from Step 1
quality: Tests cover happy path + at least 2 edge cases per function

steps.failure_handling: If tests fail, fix test code (not implementation). If implementation bug found, note for review step.

steps.name: Review
steps.what: Perform cumulative-scope review of all code changes (implementation + tests). Spawn harness-review-agent. Focus on: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, test quality.

quality: Every 'no issue' claim backed by evidence

steps.failure_handling: Re-dispatch reviewer with 'go deeper' instruction on sparse areas.

steps.name: Fix
steps.what: Apply fixes for findings from review_report.json. Prioritize P0 then P1. Run {{verify_command}} after each fix batch to ensure no regressions.

existence: All P0 findings have corresponding code changes

steps.failure_handling: If fix breaks tests, revert and retry. Max 3 retries per finding.

steps.name: Verify
steps.what: Spawn harness-eval-agent for independent validation of all work. Check all numbered standards including convergence, deliverable completeness, and integration.

existence: Eval report produced with PASS/FAIL per standard

steps.failure_handling: Feed failure details back to Fix step. Circuit breaker at max_cycles.

cycle.convergence_metric: {{verify_command}} passes AND new P0 = 0 AND new P1 < previous cycle

eval_standards.name: Deliverable Completeness
eval_standards.check: All deliverables from mission.md exist and have substance
eval_standards.method: For each deliverable listed in mission.md Output Definition, verify the file/path exists and is non-trivial (>50 LOC for code, >20 lines for config).
eval_standards.pass_condition: Every listed deliverable exists, is non-empty, and matches the expected format from mission.md.
eval_standards.on_fail: Return to Implement step to create missing deliverables

eval_standards.name: Functional Correctness
eval_standards.pass_condition: Exit code 0, zero failing tests, zero skipped tests.
eval_standards.on_fail: Return to Test step to fix failing tests

eval_standards.name: Cross-Module Integration
eval_standards.method: Verify data flows through all module boundaries. Check that outputs from upstream modules are valid inputs for downstream modules.
eval_standards.pass_condition: End-to-end pipeline produces expected output. All intermediate values are non-empty and correctly typed.
eval_standards.on_fail: Identify which boundary fails and return to Fix step

eval_standards.name: Finding Density
eval_standards.check: Review finding density meets minimum threshold
eval_standards.method: Count findings per module in review_report.json.
eval_standards.pass_condition: Each module has >= 1 finding per 500 LOC, or justified sparsity.

eval_standards.name: Convergence
eval_standards.check: Finding reduction is genuine across review cycles
eval_standards.method: Compare findings between current and previous cycle. If cycle < min_cycles, FAIL.
eval_standards.pass_condition: cycle_iteration >= min_cycles AND {{verify_command}} passes AND new P0 = 0 AND new P1 < previous cycle.
eval_standards.on_fail: Continue to next cycle. Circuit breaker at max_cycles.
